name: course-selling-app
description: -Initialise a new node.js project -Add Express, jsonwebtoken to it as a dependancy -create index.js -add route skeletons for user login,signup, purchase a course,se course -add routes for admin login,admin signup,create a course , add course content, -add middleware for user and admin auth -define the schema for User, Admin , Course, Purchase -completee the routes for user login,signup,purchase a course,see course (extra points - use express routing to better structure routes) -create the frontend
